Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit

Karachi, Pakistan

Single origin, small batch

Coffee

We treat the bean like a story worth telling slowly.

Coffee is the most drunk thing in the world and often the least considered. At Mazi we slow it down. Every origin is tasted blind before it earns a place on the menu. Every roast is logged. Every cup is pulled by someone who cares whether you come back.

We are not chasing the loudest, most acidic cup on the block. We are chasing the one you finish without checking your phone, then order again.

From cherry to cup

  1. 01

    Source

    We buy from farms we can name and trust, in season, at a price that respects the work.

  2. 02

    Roast

    Small batches, profiled by hand. We chase sweetness and clarity, not darkness for its own sake.

  3. 03

    Brew

    Dialled in daily. The same bean tastes different with the weather, so we taste it every morning.

  4. 04

    Serve

    In a real cup, at a real table, with time to drink it. That last step is the whole point.

On the bar

Ask for the rotation

Our single origin changes through the year. The barista will tell you what is pouring today.

See the menu

Mazi

A room for slow mornings and long conversations.
